results.title: Kuwait Envoy to US takes part in joint Gulf-Jordanian congressional meeting
results.description: WASHINGTON: Kuwait's Ambassador to the United States, Sheikha Al-Zain Al-Sabah, has participated in the second joint Gulf-Jordanian meeting with Democratic members of the US House...

results.title: Taiwan must heed calls to share responsibility for ‘collective defence’, president says
results.description: The Taiwanese government has now proposed a new, NT$210 billion defence package to the end of 2031.

results.title: Teen told to attend drug and alcohol services after neglecting child in her care
results.description: A TEENAGER who neglected a child left in her care has been told she must attend appointments with substance misuse services.

results.title: Victorian teachers ‘insulted’ by state government’s latest pay offer
results.description: The Victorian State Government has tabled a fresh pay offer in an effort to prevent teachers from walking off the job. Australian Education Union branch councillor and leading member of “Fight The Crisis”, Lucy Honan says Ben Carroll’s latest deal to stop the teacher strike was “pathetic”. “We were completely inflamed by the email that [...]
results.source: 3aw - Melbourne's Favourite News And Talk Station

results.title: Sonam Wangchuk To March to Parliament As Hunger Strike Enters Day 20, Says ‘I’ll Come Back as a Ghost’ if It Fails (Video)
results.description: Climate activist and education reformer Sonam Wangchuk’s indefinite hunger strike entered its 20th consecutive day on Friday, with the campaigner reiterating his resolve to join a planned march to Parliament on July 20.

results.title: Mozambique | IPAJ must ensure justice for economically vulnerable citizens
results.description: The Mozambican Minister of Justice, Mateus Saize, has recommended the country’s Institute for Legal Aid and Assistance (IPAJ) to fulfill its mission with responsibility, ensuring greater access to justice for economically vulnerable citizens. Speaking at the 12th IPAJ Consultative Council meeting, held under the motto “IPAJ: Where vulnerability finds protection and rights find defense”, by... Source
